name: GRATE: Temporal Extensions for Inductive KG Foundation Models via Gated Rotary Attention
content: Knowledge graph foundation models such as Ultra and Trix achieve strong inductive transfer by learning relation-graph representations that generalise to unseen entities and relations. Extending this transferability to temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) remains challenging: existing temporal models tie their parameters to dataset-specific entities, relations, or timestamps and are not designed to transfer to TKGs with disjoint vocabularies. We propose GRATE (Gated Rotary Attention for Temporal Enco
summary: GRATE通过引入Gated Rotary Attention机制，解决了在时间知识图谱（TKGs）上实现强迁移学习的挑战。它不增加任何可学习参数，并利用相对时间差异来编码时间和查询之间的边缘消息旋转，同时应用条件门以选择与时间相关的信号。
key_insights: GRATE能够通过Gated Rotary Attention机制在不增加额外参数的情况下处理时间信息
GRATE设计用于跨数据集的时间迁移学习，并且可以整合到现有的知识图谱基础模型中
构建了两个新的基准测试套件以评估GRATE在不同领域中的性能
xihe_relevance: GRATE对于曦和系统在处理时间和迁移学习方面具有潜在价值
